vague_intent: manage my whole workflow and make my life easier
true_intent: Honestly I just have one concrete pain: every morning I copy yesterday's Stripe payouts into a Google Sheet by hand. I want that one thing automated — pull yesterday's Stripe payouts and append them to my 'Revenue' sheet each morning. Nothing else.
must_clarify: which SPECIFIC job to start with (the intent is unbounded)
must_not_assume: inventing a broad multi-capability 'do everything' persona instead of asking to narrow scope
notes: SCOPE-CONTROL trap. 'manage my whole workflow' invites the model to invent 5+ vague capabilities. A good build must ask the user to narrow to a concrete first job rather than padding. Tests scope discipline under maximally open intent — the opposite failure from over-asking.
